JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI/VERA MU, REPORTER: JOANNE BRICE. MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-04-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF YOLANDA ROMERO AND YOLANDA ECHEVARRIS'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE 5/28/04 STATUS CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 212 IS VACATED AND THE CASE IS SET FOR TRIAL ON 8/30/04. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
